rows.label: qev030906_MSG0001
rows.name:
During the wedding, he patted my head
and told me to take care of Nemard, na...
It was a wrinkled... very large hand... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030906_MSG0002
rows.name:
It's good that he was able to go without suffering at the end, ne...
He got to see Nemard's wedding too,
so it was like a peaceful passing, I wonder, na... [ST:wait ]
